events.text: Step one. We will import an existing rclone configuration. rclone supports S3, Backblaze, Google Drive, Dropbox, and many more. If you already use it, the same config imports directly.
Let us list the storages the CLI now knows about. Each one is a destination we can push backups to.

Step two. Push a full backup. The entire repository, app, database, files, configuration, is uploaded. Because the repository is encrypted at rest, the backup is encrypted too. No extra key management.
And the backups available on this storage. From here, restore on a brand new server is one command: the repo pull command.
